sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Kha khaici pha vawh ni, nisimin vawh ni,
Lam dung tengah vawh ni, tua itna khaici;
Kha
khaici pha vawh ni, muang den ni Pasian,
Nasepna nuamsa-in sang ding thaman
lian.

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Kha khaici pha vawh ni,
Ni a niam hang zong, lungkia ke’n cimtak
ke’n
Nasep zawh siang dong.

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Kha khaici pha vawh ni, thungenin kuan ni,
I
vawh khaici phate, hong po khia ding hi;
Upna kip tawh vawh ni, van guah hong zu ding;
I lozau
khempeuh teng kham khai tawh dim ding.

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Kha khaici pha vawh ni, upna a neu
hang,
Thanem taleng vawh ni, khitui a luan hang;
Nasep i zawh siang dong, hun ngah bang sem
ding,
Anlak hun hong tung dong, lungdam tawntung ding.
